description: Contains financial metrics from SEC filings, including balance sheet, income statement, and cash flow data.

columns.name: id
columns.description: Unique identifier for each financial data point

columns.name: ticker
columns.description: Company stock ticker symbol (e.g., NVDA, AAPL, TSLA)

columns.name: company_name
columns.description: Full name of the company

columns.name: filing_type
columns.description: Type of SEC filing (e.g., 10-K, 10-Q)

columns.name: fiscal_year
columns.description: Fiscal year of the filing

columns.name: fiscal_period
columns.description: Fiscal period (e.g., annual, Q1, Q2, Q3)

columns.name: filing_date
columns.description: Date when the filing was submitted to the SEC

columns.name: accession_number
columns.description: SEC accession number for the filing

columns.name: statement_type
columns.description: Type of financial statement (e.g., Balance Sheet, Income Statement, Cash Flow Statement)

columns.name: concept
columns.description: Financial concept or line item (e.g., Revenue, Assets, Net Income)

columns.name: value_text
columns.description: Text representation of the value, preserving original formatting (e.g., '$1,234')

columns.name: value_numeric
columns.description: Numeric representation of the value for calculations

columns.name: unit
columns.description: Unit of measurement (e.g., usd, shares)

columns.name: context_id
columns.description: XBRL context identifier (e.g., c-21, c-22)

columns.name: context_label
columns.description: Human-readable context label (e.g., 'As of 2023-09-30', 'Period from 2023-01-01 to 2023-09-30')

columns.name: date_type
columns.description: Type of date context (INSTANT or DURATION)

columns.name: as_of_date
columns.description: Point-in-time date for INSTANT contexts

columns.name: period_start_date
columns.description: Start date for DURATION contexts

columns.name: period_end_date
columns.description: End date for all contexts (either the INSTANT date or the end of DURATION)

columns.name: taxonomy_prefix
columns.description: XBRL taxonomy prefix (e.g., us-gaap, dei)

columns.name: is_normalized
columns.description: Whether this data point is from the normalized financial data section

table_rules: Always use period_end_date for time-based analysis rather than fiscal_year/fiscal_period
For financial metrics, use SUM() or AVG() as appropriate
When comparing companies, join on ticker
Handle NULL values appropriately in financial data
For revenue analysis, use concept = 'Revenues' or concept = 'Revenue' depending on the company
For quarterly analysis, filter by fiscal_period = 'Q1', 'Q2', or 'Q3'
For annual analysis, filter by fiscal_period = 'annual'
For time series analysis, ORDER BY period_end_date

column_rules.value_numeric: Use for calculations, aggregations, and comparisons
column_rules.value_text: Use for display purposes only, not for calculations
column_rules.concept: Different companies may use slightly different concept names for the same financial metric
column_rules.period_end_date: Preferred column for date filtering and ordering
column_rules.statement_type: Filter by 'Balance Sheet', 'Income Statement', or 'Cash Flow Statement' to get specific financial statements
